content:
// I/O pad instantiations (blackbox mode)
sky130_ef_io__gpiov2_pad_wrapped clk_pad (
    .PAD(clk),
    .IN(clk_in),
    .OUT(clk_out),
    .OE_N(clk_oe_n),
    .IN_H(clk_in_h),
    .DM[0](clk_dm_0),
    .DM[1](clk_dm_1),
    .DM[2](clk_dm_2),
    .ANALOG_EN(clk_analog_en),
    .ANALOG_POL(clk_analog_pol),
    .ANALOG_SEL(clk_analog_sel),
    .ENABLE_H(clk_enable_h),
    .ENABLE_INP_H(clk_enable_inp_h),
    .ENABLE_VDDA_H(clk_enable_vdda_h),
    .ENABLE_VDDIO(clk_enable_vddio),
    .ENABLE_VSWITCH_H(clk_enable_vswitch_h),
    .HLD_H_N(clk_hld_h_n),
    .HLD_OVR(clk_hld_ovr),
